title: origanum vulgare var. albiflorum
intro: Origanum vulgare var. albiflorum, also known as white-flowered wild marjoram, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its white or pale pink flowers and pine-like fragrance. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Origanum vulgare var. albiflorum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to flavor food, promote relaxation, and soothe digestive issues.
